title: Geopolitical Risks Push Energy Prices Higher
section_path: Geopolitical Risks Push Energy Prices Higher
section_path_text: Geopolitical Risks Push Energy Prices Higher
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A weaker USD helped boost investor appetite in commodity markets. Rising geopolitical risks were also front of mind following damage to energy infrastructure earlier this week. European natural gas extended gains after Russia warned of further risks to supply.
